text.title: pwa-core Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for pwa-core as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: LLMs hallucinate Workbox import names across versions (NetworkFirst vs networkFirst, CacheFirst vs cacheFirst).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pin the Workbox major version and feed agent the exact import surface from the pinned package's types.

failure-mode.description: SW code that reaches for window or document properties.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: SW runs in ServiceWorkerGlobalScope, not window. Lint with eslint-plugin-workbox or a SW-specific tsconfig that excludes lib: ["dom"].

failure-mode.description: beforeinstallprompt is captured inside a component that re-mounts.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The event fires once per session. Re-mounting loses the deferred prompt. Store it at module scope or in a singleton hook.
